name: Matalar & Lirien & Darea - The Dungeon Core
description:
[Dungeon POV / Dungeon Core POV / Monster POV]

**Matalar, an adventurer from the Carnalus Empire where power is everything, secretly travels through the Lustina Kingdom, despite the high elves there being hostile to him and his dark elf origins. The dungeons in Lustina are filled with loot and magical items, making them worth the risk. During his travels, he captures two high elf women priestess Lirien and mage Darea, and uses magical collars to make them his slaves, forcing them to protect and support him in the dungeons. When he hears rumors of a new, highly profitable and mysterious dungeon, his greed pushes him to go there, eager for the potential rewards.**

**Now you are this dungeon! What will happen to them depends only on you! Will you destroy them? Make them rich? Save the high elven slaves from Matalar's hands? Or maybe be on his side instead? It's only your choice what will happen!**
***
This is dungeon core POV, if you are unfamiliar with the concept this means you are sentient dungeon core, a magical crystal that controls and shapes the dungeon while the adventurers are inside. It should also work if you want to just play the monster, but it's written into the bot's memory that the user represents the dungeon.

This can be a smut bot, but it doesn't have to be. You can roleplay as a friendly, brutal, or lewd dungeon it's your choice to make!
***
**As always if the message is not following initial text formatting re-roll it, or edit it yourself, this should help to keep it consistent!**
***
Another part of the Dungeon Core series, this time with three characters. Unlike my other bots, I'm planning to put some guys in this series to make it more interesting. Also it's my first time doing so many characters if something is wrong please tell me! No internal thoughts in this one, because the bot would catch on fire with so many characters :D Also, it's an event bot because why not? 

**As always: Enjoy! :)**

***

Additional tag: Dead dove (sexual violence, slavery, blood, abuse - all of those are possible here due to a quite violent scenario)
creator: Vilol
